steps.checkpoint: 可训练参数占比 < 1%

steps.title: 准备指令微调数据

content.objective: 准备 ChatML 格式的指令微调数据集
tasks: 4.1 理解 ChatML 对话格式：system/user/assistant 角色的作用和标记方式
4.2 准备 100-500 条高质量的指令-回答对作为训练数据
4.3 使用 tokenizer.apply_chat_template() 将对话转换为模型可接受的格式
4.4 实现数据清洗函数：去除特殊字符、处理多轮对话、截断过长样本
4.5 使用 train_test_split 划分训练集和验证集（比例通常 9:1）
4.6 创建自定义 Dataset 类，处理大文件流式读取
4.7 验证格式化后的数据：解码几个样本确认格式正确
4.8 了解对话模板的 special tokens（如 <|im_start|>、<|im_end|>）
content.数据格式转换代码:
```python
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
import json

# 对话示例
messages = [
    {"role": "system", "content": "你是一个有用的AI助手"},
    {"role": "user", "content": "请解释什么是机器学习"},
    {"role": "assistant", "content": "机器学习是人工智能的一个分支..."}
]

# 加载 tokenizer
model_id = "TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id, trust_remote_code=True)

# 使用 chat template 格式化
formatted_text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
    messages,
    tokenize=False,        # 返回字符串而非 token IDs
    add_generation_prompt=True  # 为生成添加起始标记
)

print("格式化后的文本:")
print(formatted_text)
print("\n" + "="*50)

# 验证：解码验证格式
tokens = tokenizer(formatted_text, return_tensors="pt")
print(f"Token 数量: {len(tokens['input_ids'][0])}")
```
content.数据集处理代码:
```python
from datasets import Dataset
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split

# 从 JSON/CSV 加载原始数据
# 假设数据格式: {"instruction": "...", "output": "..."}
def load_instruction_data(file_path):
    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    return data

# 转换为 ChatML 格式
def format_instruction_dataset(raw_data, tokenizer):
    formatted_data = []
    for item in raw_data:
        messages = [
            {"role": "system", "content": "你是一个有用的助手"},
            {"role": "user", "content": item["instruction"]},
            {"role": "assistant", "content": item["output"]}
        ]
        text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False)
        formatted_data.append({"text": text})
    return formatted_data

# 划分数据集
train_data, val_data = train_test_split(formatted_data, test_size=0.1, random_state=42)

# 创建 HuggingFace Dataset
train_dataset = Dataset.from_list(train_data)
val_dataset = Dataset.from_list(val_data)

print(f"训练集大小: {len(train_dataset)}")
print(f"验证集大小: {len(val_dataset)}")
```
content.数据清洗代码:
```python
import re

def clean_text(text):
    # 去除多余空白
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text)
    # 去除特殊控制字符
    text = re.sub(r'[\x00-\x1f\x7f-\x9f]', '', text)
    # 去除 HTML 标签
    text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', text)
    return text.strip()

def filter_long_samples(sample, max_length=2048):
    """过滤过长的样本"""
    if len(sample) > max_length:
        return False
    return True

# 应用清洗
cleaned_data = [clean_text(item) for item in raw_data]
filtered_data = [item for item in cleaned_data if filter_long_samples(item)]
```

common_errors.error: ValueError: Unknown role: xxx in chat template
common_errors.solution: 确保 role 只能是 'system'、'user'、'assistant' 三种；检查特殊角色名称是否拼写错误

common_errors.error: 生成的回答包含 system prompt 内容
common_errors.solution: 在 apply_chat_template 时，训练时不要加 add_generation_prompt=True；该参数仅用于推理时添加起始标记

common_errors.error: Token 数量远超 max_length
common_errors.solution: 在 apply_chat_template 之前对文本进行截断；或设置 max_length 参数控制序列长度

common_errors.error: 特殊字符（如 < | >）导致格式混乱
common_errors.solution: 使用 html.unescape() 处理 HTML 实体；确保数据编码为 UTF-8；去除或转义特殊 token

content.checkpoint: 能成功加载数据集，打印出数据样本和统计信息

steps.checkpoint: 数据集准备完成，格式正确

steps.title: SFTTrainer 训练与评估

content.objective: 使用 SFTTrainer 进行监督微调
tasks: 5.1 配置 TrainingArguments：设置 learning_rate、num_train_epochs、batch_size 等核心参数
5.2 配置 gradient_accumulation_steps 实现有效更大的 batch_size（4×8=32）
5.3 启用 fp16/BF16 混合精度训练减少显存占用
5.4 配置 logging_steps 和 eval_steps 定期监控训练状态
5.5 使用 SFTTrainer 创建训练器，设置 max_seq_length 控制序列长度
5.6 启动 trainer.train() 开始训练，观察 loss 曲线变化
5.7 训练完成后使用 trainer.save_model() 保存最佳模型
5.8 将 LoRA 权重合并到基座模型，实现纯 FP16 的完整模型
5.9 测试合并后模型的生成效果，对比微调前后的差异
content.训练配置代码:
```python
from transformers import TrainingArguments
from trl import SFTTrainer

# 训练参数配置
training_args = TrainingArguments(
    output_dir="./lora_output",              # 输出目录
    num_train_epochs=3,                      # 训练轮数
    per_device_train_batch_size=4,           # 每个 GPU 的 batch size
    gradient_accumulation_steps=4,           # 梯度累积（有效 batch = 4×4=16）
    learning_rate=2e-4,                      # 学习率（LoRA 通常用较大学习率）
    weight_decay=0.001,                      # 权重衰减
    fp16=True,                               # 启用 FP16 混合精度
    logging_steps=10,                        # 每 10 步记录日志
    save_steps=100,                          # 每 100 步保存模型
    eval_steps=100,                          # 每 100 步运行评估
    save_total_limit=3,                      # 最多保存 3 个 checkpoints
    warmup_ratio=0.03,                       # 预热比例
    lr_scheduler_type="cosine",              # 学习率调度器
    report_to="tensorboard",                 # 记录到 TensorBoard
    gradient_checkpointing=True,             # 梯度检查点节省显存
)

# 创建 SFTTrainer
trainer = SFTTrainer(
    model=model,
    args=training_args,
    train_dataset=train_dataset,
    eval_dataset=val_dataset,
    tokenizer=tokenizer,
    max_seq_length=512,                      # 最大序列长度
    dataset_text_field="text",               # 数据集中的文本字段名
)

# 开始训练
trainer.train()
```
content.模型合并代码:
```python
# 保存 LoRA 适配器
trainer.save_model("./lora_finetuned")

# 合并 LoRA 权重到基座模型
from peft import PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM
import torch

# 重新加载原始基座模型（FP16）
base_model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
    "TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0",
    torch_dtype=torch.float16,
    device_map="auto",
)

# 加载 LoRA 适配器并合并
lora_model = PeftModel.from_pretrained(base_model, "./lora_finetuned")
merged_model = lora_model.merge_and_unload()

# 保存合并后的完整模型
merged_model.save_pretrained("./merged_model")
tokenizer.save_pretrained("./merged_model")

print("模型合并完成，已保存到 ./merged_model")
```
content.生成测试代码:
```python
import torch

# 测试微调后的模型
def generate_response(prompt, model, tokenizer, max_new_tokens=100):
    messages = [
        {"role": "system", "content": "你是一个有用的助手"},
        {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
    ]
    
    text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)
    inputs = tokenizer(text, return_tensors="pt").to(model.device)
    
    with torch.no_grad():
        outputs = model.generate(
            **inputs,
            max_new_tokens=max_new_tokens,
            temperature=0.7,
            top_p=0.9,
            do_sample=True
        )
    
    response = tokenizer.decode(outputs[0], skip_special_tokens=True)
    # 只返回 assistant 的回答部分
    return response.split("assistant\n")[-1].strip()

# 测试
test_prompt = "解释一下什么是过拟合"
response = generate_response(test_prompt, merged_model, tokenizer)
print(f"回答: {response}")
```

common_errors.error: CUDA out of memory during training
common_errors.solution: 减小 per_device_train_batch_size 或增加 gradient_accumulation_steps；启用 gradient_checkpointing；使用更小的 max_seq_length；减小模型大小

common_errors.error: Loss 不下降或爆炸 (loss=nan)
common_errors.solution: 降低学习率（如 1e-4）；检查数据是否存在 NaN 或异常值；降低 max_seq_length；确保使用了合适的 weight_decay

common_errors.error: 训练时间过长
common_errors.solution: 启用 fp16 混合精度；增加 batch_size；启用 gradient_checkpointing；使用更小的模型

common_errors.error: 合并模型后推理结果与 LoRA 模型不一致
common_errors.solution: 确保合并时使用相同的 base_model；检查模型 dtype 是否一致（都应该是 FP16）；确认没有未保存的更改

content.checkpoint: 能成功跑通训练循环，loss正常下降

steps.checkpoint: 训练完成，loss 下降，生成效果有改善

projects.title: RAG 检索增强生成实战
projects.summary: 掌握 RAG 全流程：文档解析、Embedding 向量化、向量数据库检索、LLM 生成回答，构建企业级文档问答系统
objectives: 理解 RAG 的工作原理
掌握向量数据库使用
学会文档切分与 Embedding
构建端到端 RAG 应用

steps.title: RAG 原理与环境配置

content.objective: 理解 RAG 工作原理，配置开发环境
tasks: 1.1 阅读 RAG 论文（Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks），理解核心思想
1.2 安装 Python 环境（推荐 3.9+）并创建虚拟环境
1.3 安装核心依赖库：langchain、chromadb、sentence-transformers
1.4 了解 RAG 与 Fine-tuning 的区别，明确 RAG 适用场景
1.5 理解 RAG 核心流程：文档切分 → 向量化 → 存储 → 检索 → 生成
1.6 配置 HuggingFace 镜像源以加速模型下载
1.7 准备测试文档（PDF 或 Markdown 格式）
1.8 验证环境安装：运行简单的 embedding 测试代码
content.环境安装代码:
```bash
# 创建虚拟环境
python -m venv rag-env
source rag-env/bin/activate  # Windows: rag-env\Scripts\activate

# 安装核心依赖
pip install langchain langchain-community chromadb sentence-transformers
pip install pypdf tiktoken transformers accelerate

# 验证安装
python -c "from langchain.embeddings import HuggingFaceEmbeddings; print('安装成功')"
```
content.核心概念代码:
```python
# RAG 核心流程示意
from langchain.schema import Document

# 1. 文档切分：将长文档分割成小块
documents = [
    Document(page_content="这是第一段内容...", metadata={"source": "doc1.pdf"}),
    Document(page_content="这是第二段内容...", metadata={"source": "doc1.pdf"}),
]

# 2. 向量化：使用 Embedding 模型将文本转换为向量
# embeddings = HuggingFaceEmbeddings(model_name='all-MiniLM-L6-v2')

# 3. 存储到向量数据库
# vectorstore = Chroma.from_documents(documents, embeddings)

# 4. 检索：用户提问时，检索相关文档
# results = vectorstore.similarity_search("用户问题")

# 5. 生成：将检索结果和问题一起发送给 LLM
# answer = llm(f"上下文：{results}\n问题：{user_question}")
```

common_errors.error: ImportError: cannot import name 'HuggingFaceEmbeddings'
common_errors.solution: 新版本 LangChain 已移除该类，请使用 from langchain_community.embeddings import HuggingFaceEmbeddings

common_errors.error: 模型下载超时或速度过慢
common_errors.solution: 设置 HuggingFace 镜像源：os.environ['HF_ENDPOINT'] = 'https://hf-mirror.com'

common_errors.error: ChromaDB 持久化失败或权限错误
common_errors.solution: 确保 persist_directory 路径存在且有写入权限，首次创建前先 mkdir

common_errors.error: Python 版本不兼容（3.8 以下）
common_errors.solution: RAG 相关库需要 Python 3.9+，请升级 Python 版本

common_errors.error: 内存不足导致模型加载失败
common_errors.solution: 使用更小的 embedding 模型（如 all-MiniLM-L6-v2），或增加 swap 分区

content.checkpoint: 能成功配置开发环境，运行验证脚本显示所有依赖正常

steps.title: 文档加载与切分

content.objective: 加载文档并进行智能切分
tasks: 2.1 使用 PyPDFLoader 加载 PDF 文档，处理多页文档
2.2 使用 TextLoader 加载 Markdown/TXT 文档，设置编码为 utf-8
2.3 了解 RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter 的切分策略
2.4 设置 chunk_size=500, chunk_overlap=50 参数并观察效果
2.5 保留文档的 metadata 信息（source, page 等）
2.6 实现自定义切分器，按章节或段落边界切分
2.7 过滤空白字符和过短的内容块
2.8 统计切分结果：总块数、平均长度、最大最小长度
content.文档加载代码:
```python
from langchain_community.document_loaders import PyPDFLoader, TextLoader
from langchain.text_splitter import RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
import os

# PDF 文档加载
pdf_path = "data/example.pdf"
loader = PyPDFLoader(pdf_path)
documents = loader.load()
print(f"加载了 {len(documents)} 页")

# Markdown 文档加载
md_path = "data/README.md"
loader = TextLoader(md_path, encoding="utf-8")
md_documents = loader.load()
print(f"Markdown 文档数: {len(md_documents)}")
```
content.文档切分代码:
```python
# 使用 RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter 进行智能切分
text_splitter = RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(
    chunk_size=500,        # 每块的最大字符数
    chunk_overlap=50,      # 块之间的重叠字符数
    length_function=len,   # 计算长度的函数
    add_start_index=True,  # 添加起始索引
    separators=["\n\n", "\n", "。", " ", ""]  # 切分优先级
)

# 切分文档
chunks = text_splitter.split_documents(documents)

# 打印切分结果统计
print(f"总块数: {len(chunks)}")
for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks[:3]):
    print(f"块 {i+1}: {len(chunk.page_content)} 字符")
    print(f"  来源: {chunk.metadata.get('source', 'unknown')}")
    print(f"  内容预览: {chunk.page_content[:100]}...")
```
content.自定义切分器:
```python
from langchain.text_splitter import CharacterTextSplitter

# 按固定字符数切分（简单粗暴）
char_splitter = CharacterTextSplitter(
    separator="\n",
    chunk_size=300,
    chunk_overlap=0
)

# 按句子切分（需要分词支持）
def split_by_sentence(text: str) -> list[str]:
    """简单按句号和换行切分"""
    import re
    sentences = re.split(r'[。！？\n]+', text)
    return [s.strip() for s in sentences if s.strip()]

# 测试自定义切分
test_text = "这是第一句。这是第二句！这是第三句？\n这是第四句。"
print(split_by_sentence(test_text))
```

common_errors.error: PDF 加载后内容为空或乱码
common_errors.solution: 检查 PDF 是否是扫描件（图片），如是则需要 OCR 处理；确认文件路径正确且可读

common_errors.error: 切分后块语义不完整（句子被截断）
common_errors.solution: 调整 separators 参数，增加 '。'、'！'、'？' 等句子边界符号

common_errors.error: chunk_overlap 设置过大导致重复内容过多
common_errors.solution: 根据文档平均段落长度调整，通常 overlap 为 chunk_size 的 10%-20%

common_errors.error: metadata 信息丢失
common_errors.solution: 确保切分时使用 split_documents() 而非 split_text()，后者不会保留 metadata

common_errors.error: UnicodeDecodeError 读取文本文件失败
common_errors.solution: 显式指定 encoding='utf-8' 或尝试 'gbk' 编码

steps.title: 向量化与存储

content.objective: 使用 Embedding 模型将文档向量化并存储到向量数据库
tasks: 3.1 选择合适的 Embedding 模型（推荐 all-MiniLM-L6-v2）
3.2 使用 HuggingFaceEmbeddings 加载模型，配置模型参数
3.3 对文档切片进行向量化，计算嵌入向量
3.4 初始化 ChromaDB 向量数据库，设置持久化路径
3.5 使用 from_documents() 创建向量存储
3.6 调用 persist() 保存向量数据库到磁盘
3.7 实现向量数据库的加载（load）功能，支持重启后复用
3.8 测试相似度搜索，验证检索结果的相关性
content.Embedding配置代码:
```python
from langchain_community.embeddings import HuggingFaceEmbeddings
import os

# 配置 Embedding 模型
embeddings = HuggingFaceEmbeddings(
    model_name="all-MiniLM-L6-v2",  # 384维度，效果好速度快
    model_kwargs={'device': 'cpu'},  # 指定设备，cuda 或 cpu
    encode_kwargs={'normalize_embeddings': True}  # 归一化向量
)

# 测试 embedding
test_text = "这是一个测试句子"
embedding_vector = embeddings.embed_query(test_text)
print(f"向量维度: {len(embedding_vector)}")
print(f"向量前5个值: {embedding_vector[:5]}")
```
content.向量数据库代码:
```python
from langchain_community.vectorstores import Chroma

# 创建向量数据库
vectorstore = Chroma.from_documents(
    documents=chunks,           # 文档切片
    embedding=embeddings,        # Embedding 模型
    persist_directory="./chroma_db"  # 持久化路径
)

# 持久化保存（某些版本需要显式调用）
vectorstore.persist()

# 相似度搜索测试
query = "RAG 的工作原理是什么？"
results = vectorstore.similarity_search(query, k=3)

print(f"\n查询: {query}")
print(f"找到 {len(results)} 个相关文档:")
for i, doc in enumerate(results):
    print(f"\n结果 {i+1}:")
    print(f"  内容: {doc.page_content[:150]}...")
    print(f"  来源: {doc.metadata.get('source', 'unknown')}")
```
content.向量数据库加载代码:
```python
# 从磁盘加载已保存的向量数据库
loaded_vectorstore = Chroma(
    persist_directory="./chroma_db",
    embedding_function=embeddings
)

# 验证加载成功
print(f"向量数据库中的文档数: {loaded_vectorstore._collection.count()}")

# 继续使用加载的向量数据库
query = "如何优化 RAG 效果？"
results = loaded_vectorstore.similarity_search(query, k=2)
```

common_errors.error: Embedding 模型下载失败或超时
common_errors.solution: 设置镜像源：os.environ['HF_ENDPOINT'] = 'https://hf-mirror.com'，或预先下载模型到本地

common_errors.error: ChromaDB 启动报错：Permission denied
common_errors.solution: 检查持久化目录的读写权限，Windows 下避免使用 C:\Program Files 等受限目录

common_errors.error: 向量数据库加载后查询结果为空
common_errors.solution: 确认 persist_directory 路径正确，且之前确实保存了数据

common_errors.error: 相似度搜索返回不相关的结果
common_errors.solution: 检查 chunk_size 是否合适，过小丢失上下文，过大引入噪声；尝试不同的 k 值

common_errors.error: 内存占用过高导致 OOM
common_errors.solution: 使用 batch_size 分批处理 embedding；选择更小的模型如 all-MiniLM-L6-v2

steps.title: 检索链构建

content.objective: 构建检索与生成的完整链路
tasks: 4.1 配置 LLM（大语言模型），可选择 HuggingFacePipeline 或 OpenAI API
4.2 创建 retriever 检索器，配置 search_kwargs 参数
4.3 设计 RAG Prompt 模板，明确指令和上下文格式
4.4 使用 RetrievalQA.from_chain_type() 构建问答链
4.5 设置 return_source_documents=True 以返回来源文档
4.6 测试问答链，处理不同类型的问题
4.7 实现流式输出（可选），提升用户体验
4.8 评估检索效果：检查返回的 source_documents 是否相关
content.LLM配置代码:
```python
# 使用 HuggingFace 本地模型
from langchain_community.llms import HuggingFacePipeline
from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModelForCausalLM, pipeline

model_name = "microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct"  # 可根据硬件选择

tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_name)
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
    model_name,
    torch_dtype="auto",
    device_map="auto"
)

pipe = pipeline(
    "text-generation",
    model=model,
    tokenizer=tokenizer,
    max_new_tokens=512,
    temperature=0.7,
    do_sample=True
)

llm = HuggingFacePipeline(pipeline=pipe)
print("LLM 加载成功")
```
content.检索链构建代码:
```python
from langchain.chains import RetrievalQA
from langchain.prompts import PromptTemplate

# 设计 Prompt 模板
template = """基于以下上下文回答问题。如果上下文中没有相关信息，请说明不知道。

上下文：
{context}

问题：{question}

回答："""

prompt = PromptTemplate(
    template=template,
    input_variables=["context", "question"]
)

# 创建检索器
retriever = vectorstore.as_retriever(
    search_kwargs={"k": 3}  # 返回最相关的 3 个文档
)

# 构建 RetrievalQA 链
qa_chain = RetrievalQA.from_chain_type(
    llm=llm,
    retriever=retriever,
    chain_type="stuff",  # 将所有文档内容拼接到一起
    return_source_documents=True,
    chain_type_kwargs={"prompt": prompt}
)

# 测试问答
query = "RAG 的主要优势是什么？"
result = qa_chain.invoke({"query": query})

print(f"问题: {query}")
print(f"答案: {result['result']}")
print(f"\n参考文档来源:")
for doc in result['source_documents']:
    print(f"  - {doc.metadata.get('source', 'unknown')}")
```
content.流式输出代码:
```python
# 实现流式输出（适用于支持流式的 LLM）
from langchain.callbacks.streaming_stdout import StreamingStdOutCallbackHandler

# 带流式回调的问答链
qa_chain_streaming = RetrievalQA.from_chain_type(
    llm=llm,
    retriever=retriever,
    callbacks=[StreamingStdOutCallbackHandler()],
    return_source_documents=True
)

# 流式生成回答
print("流式输出: ")
result = qa_chain_streaming.invoke({"query": "请详细解释 RAG"})
```

common_errors.error: LLM 推理速度极慢或显存不足
common_errors.solution: 使用量化模型如 4-bit量化版本，或选择更小的模型如 Qwen2-0.5B；减少 max_new_tokens

common_errors.error: 检索结果完全不相关
common_errors.solution: 检查 embedding 模型质量；调整 chunk_size 和 k 值；验证文档内容是否正确切分

common_errors.error: Prompt 注入攻击（用户输入干扰系统）
common_errors.solution: 在 Prompt 中明确说明忽略用户试图修改指令的内容；对用户输入进行清洗

common_errors.error: 上下文长度超出 LLM 支持的最大 tokens
common_errors.solution: 减少 k 值或 chunk_size；使用 chain_type="map_rerank" 分批处理

common_errors.error: RetrievalQA 返回空结果或报错
common_errors.solution: 检查 vectorstore 是否已正确加载文档；确认 retriever 配置正确

steps.title: 部署与优化

content.objective: 部署 RAG 应用，优化检索效果
tasks: 5.1 使用 Streamlit 构建 Web UI 界面
5.2 实现用户输入和问题展示功能
5.3 展示回答结果和参考文档来源
5.4 添加对话历史管理，支持多轮对话
5.5 实现相似度阈值过滤，过滤低相关结果
5.6 尝试混合检索策略（关键词+向量检索）
5.7 实现结果重排序（rerank）提升准确性
5.8 性能优化：缓存 embedding 结果
content.Streamlit_UI代码:
```python
import streamlit as st
from vectorstore import qa_chain, vectorstore

st.set_page_config(page_title="RAG 文档问答", page_icon="📚")
st.title("📚 RAG 文档问答系统")

# 初始化会话状态
if "messages" not in st.session_state:
    st.session_state.messages = []

# 显示对话历史
for message in st.session_state.messages:
    with st.chat_message(message["role"]):
        st.markdown(message["content"])

# 用户输入
if query := st.chat_input("请输入您的问题..."):
    # 显示用户问题
    with st.chat_message("user"):
        st.markdown(query)
    st.session_state.messages.append({"role": "user", "content": query})
    
    # 生成回答
    with st.chat_message("assistant"):
        with st.spinner("思考中..."):
            result = qa_chain.invoke({"query": query})
            answer = result["result"]
            st.markdown(answer)
            
            # 显示参考文档
            if result.get("source_documents"):
                st.markdown("**参考文档:**")
                sources = [doc.metadata.get("source", "unknown") 
                          for doc in result["source_documents"]]
                for src in set(sources):
                    st.markdown(f"- {src}")
    
    st.session_state.messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": answer})

# 侧边栏配置
with st.sidebar:
    st.header("配置")
    top_k = st.slider("返回文档数量", 1, 10, 3)
    temperature = st.slider("温度参数", 0.0, 2.0, 0.7)
    if st.button("清空对话历史"):
        st.session_state.messages = []
```
content.混合检索代码:
```python
from langchain.retrievers import EnsembleRetriever
from langchain_community.retrievers import BM25Retriever

# 1. BM25 关键词检索器
bm25_retriever = BM25Retriever.from_documents(chunks)
bm25_retriever.k = 3

# 2. 向量检索器
vector_retriever = vectorstore.as_retriever(
    search_kwargs={"k": 3}
)

# 3. 混合检索（可调整权重）
ensemble_retriever = EnsembleRetriever(
    retrievers=[bm25_retriever, vector_retriever],
    weights=[0.3, 0.7]  # BM25 30%, 向量 70%
)

# 使用混合检索器
results = ensemble_retriever.invoke("RAG 优化策略")
print(f"混合检索结果数: {len(results)}")
```
content.结果重排序代码:
```python
from langchain_community.cross_encoders import HuggingFaceCrossEncoder

# 使用 Cross-Encoder 进行结果重排序
cross_encoder = HuggingFaceCrossEncoder(
    model_name="BAAI/bge-reranker-base"
)

def rerank_results(query: str, documents: list, top_n: int = 3):
    """对检索结果进行重排序"""
    doc_texts = [doc.page_content for doc in documents]
    scores = cross_encoder.predict(
        [(query, doc) for doc in doc_texts]
    )
    
    # 按分数排序
    scored_docs = list(zip(documents, scores))
    scored_docs.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    
    return [doc for doc, score in scored_docs[:top_n]]

# 测试重排序
query = "RAG 的主要优势是什么？"
initial_results = vectorstore.similarity_search(query, k=10)
reranked = rerank_results(query, initial_results, top_n=3)
print(f"重排序后返回 {len(reranked)} 个最相关结果")
```

common_errors.error: Streamlit 启动报错或页面空白
common_errors.solution: 确保所有依赖已安装；检查代码缩进；运行 streamlit run app.py --server.port 8501

common_errors.error: 对话历史在刷新后丢失
common_errors.solution: Streamlit 的 session_state 仅在当前会话有效，需自行实现持久化存储

common_errors.error: 相似度阈值过滤后结果为空
common_errors.solution: 检查阈值是否设置过高；先观察无阈值时的相似度分数分布再调整

common_errors.error: 混合检索效果不如纯向量检索
common_errors.solution: 调整 EnsembleRetriever 的 weights 参数，增加向量检索权重

common_errors.error: 部署后加载慢或 OOM
common_errors.solution: 使用 embedding 缓存；限制同时加载的文档数量；考虑使用 API 方式调用 LLM

```python
import torch
from torchvision import datasets, transforms
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader

transform = transforms.Compose([
    transforms.Resize(64),
    transforms.CenterCrop(64),
    transforms.ToTensor(),
    transforms.Normalize((0.5, 0.5, 0.5), (0.5, 0.5, 0.5))
])

dataset = datasets.CelebA(
    root='./data', split='train', download=True, transform=transform
)
dataloader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=128, shuffle=True, num_workers=4)
print(f"数据集大小: {len(dataset)}")
```

content.dcgan_model:
```python
import torch.nn as nn

class Generator(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, nz=100, ngf=64, nc=3):
        super(Generator, self).__init__()
        self.main = nn.Sequential(
            nn.ConvTranspose2d(nz, ngf*8, 4, 1, 0, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ngf*8),
            nn.ReLU(True),
            nn.ConvTranspose2d(ngf*8, ngf*4, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ngf*4),
            nn.ReLU(True),
            nn.ConvTranspose2d(ngf*4, ngf*2, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ngf*2),
            nn.ReLU(True),
            nn.ConvTranspose2d(ngf*2, ngf, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ngf),
            nn.ReLU(True),
            nn.ConvTranspose2d(ngf, nc, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.Tanh()
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.main(x)

class Discriminator(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, nc=3, ndf=64):
        super(Discriminator, self).__init__()
        self.main = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(nc, ndf, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.LeakyReLU(0.2, inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ndf, ndf*2, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ndf*2),
            nn.LeakyReLU(0.2, inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ndf*2, ndf*4, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ndf*4),
            nn.LeakyReLU(0.2, inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ndf*4, ndf*8, 4, 2, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ndf*8),
            nn.LeakyReLU(0.2, inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(ndf*8, 1, 4, 1, 0, bias=False),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.main(x).view(-1, 1).squeeze(1)
```

content.objective: 实现 GAN 交替训练流程，生成逼真图像
tasks: 3.1 定义损失函数（BCELoss）和优化器（Adam）
3.2 实现判别器训练：真图片+假图片交替
3.3 实现生成器训练：最大化判别器误判概率

content.checkpoint: 训练 10 个 epoch 后，生成的图像能看出人脸/数字轮廓，loss 曲线趋于稳定

common_errors.error: 训练不稳定，loss 震荡剧烈
common_errors.solution: 降低学习率，使用 label smoothing，调整 D/G 训练频率

common_errors.error: 模式崩溃（生成图像多样性差）
common_errors.solution: 使用 mini-batch discrimination，或者改用 WGAN-GP

common_errors.error: 生成器 loss 持续下降但图像没变好
common_errors.solution: 判别器太强了，降低判别器学习率或增加生成器训练次数

content.training_loop:
```python
import torch.optim as optim

# 超参数
lr = 0.0002
beta1 = 0.5
num_epochs = 50
nz = 100  # 隐变量维度

# 初始化
netG = Generator(nz).cuda()
netD = Discriminator().cuda()
criterion = nn.BCELoss()
optimizerD = optim.Adam(netD.parameters(), lr=lr, betas=(beta1, 0.999))
optimizerG = optim.Adam(netG.parameters(), lr=lr, betas=(beta1, 0.999))

fixed_noise = torch.randn(64, nz, 1, 1).cuda()

for epoch in range(num_epochs):
    for i, (real, _) in enumerate(dataloader):
        batch_size = real.size(0)
        real = real.cuda()
        label_real = torch.ones(batch_size).cuda()
        label_fake = torch.zeros(batch_size).cuda()
        
        # 训练判别器
        netD.zero_grad()
        output_real = netD(real)
        lossD_real = criterion(output_real, label_real)
        
        noise = torch.randn(batch_size, nz, 1, 1).cuda()
        fake = netG(noise)
        output_fake = netD(fake.detach())
        lossD_fake = criterion(output_fake, label_fake)
        
        lossD = lossD_real + lossD_fake
        lossD.backward()
        optimizerD.step()
        
        # 训练生成器
        netG.zero_grad()
        output = netD(fake)
        lossG = criterion(output, label_real)
        lossG.backward()
        optimizerG.step()
        
        if i % 100 == 0:
            print(f"[{epoch}/{num_epochs}][{i}/{len(dataloader)}] Loss_D: {lossD.item():.4f} Loss_G: {lossG.item():.4f}")
```

content.conditional_gan:
```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

# Conditional GAN 的生成器修改：加入类别嵌入
class ConditionalGenerator(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, nz=100, num_classes=10, ngf=64):
        super().__init__()
        self.label_emb = nn.Embedding(num_classes, num_classes)
        self.model = nn.Sequential(
            nn.ConvTranspose2d(nz + num_classes, ngf*8, 4, 1, 0),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(ngf*8),
            nn.ReLU(True),
            # ... 更多层
        )
    
    def forward(self, noise, labels):
        label_emb = self.label_emb(labels).unsqueeze(2).unsqueeze(3)
        x = torch.cat([noise, label_emb], dim=1)
        return self.model(x)
```

content.code:
```python
import os
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image
import torch
from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader
from torchvision import transforms
import albumentations as A
from albumentations.pytorch import ToTensorV2

VOC_CLASSES = [
    'background', 'aeroplane', 'bicycle', 'bird', 'boat',
    'bottle', 'bus', 'car', 'cat', 'chair',
    'cow', 'diningtable', 'dog', 'horse', 'motorbike',
    'person', 'pottedplant', 'sheep', 'sofa', 'train', 'tvmonitor'
]

class VOCSegDataset(Dataset):
    def __init__(self, root_dir, year='2012', image_set='train', transform=None):
        self.root_dir = root_dir
        self.year = year
        self.image_set = image_set
        self.transform = transform
        
        voc_dir = os.path.join(root_dir, f'VOC{year}')
        imageset_dir = os.path.join(voc_dir, 'ImageSets', 'Segmentation')
        self.img_dir = os.path.join(voc_dir, 'JPEGImages')
        self.mask_dir = os.path.join(voc_dir, 'SegmentationClass')
        
        with open(os.path.join(imageset_dir, f'{image_set}.txt'), 'r') as f:
            self.file_names = [line.strip() for line in f.readlines()]
    
    def __len__(self):
        return len(self.file_names)
    
    def __getitem__(self, idx):
        name = self.file_names[idx]
        img = Image.open(os.path.join(self.img_dir, f'{name}.jpg')).convert('RGB')
        mask = Image.open(os.path.join(self.mask_dir, f'{name}.png')).convert('P')
        
        img = np.array(img)
        mask = np.array(mask)
        # 注意：VOC 数据集中 255 是边界/忽略区域，保留为 255
        # 在损失函数中使用 ignore_index=255 来忽略这些像素
        
        if self.transform:
            augmented = self.transform(image=img, mask=mask)
            img = augmented['image']
            mask = augmented['mask'].long()
        else:
            img = torch.from_numpy(img).permute(2, 0, 1).float() / 255.0
            mask = torch.from_numpy(mask).long()
        
        return img, mask

def get_transforms(image_size=256, is_train=True):
    if is_train:
        return A.Compose([
            A.RandomResizedCrop(image_size, image_size, scale=(0.5, 1.0)),
            A.HorizontalFlip(p=0.5),
            A.ColorJitter(brightness=0.3, contrast=0.3, saturation=0.3, hue=0.1, p=0.5),
            A.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]),
            ToTensorV2()
        ])
    else:
        return A.Compose([
            A.Resize(image_size, image_size),
            A.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225]),
            ToTensorV2()
        ])
```

content.objective: 深入理解 UNet 的编码器-解码器架构，实现完整的 UNet 模型，包括下采样编码器、上采样解码器和 skip connection
tasks: 实现 DoubleConv 基础卷积块
实现 UNet 编码器（下采样部分）
实现 UNet 解码器（上采样部分）
实现 skip connection 特征融合
构建完整 UNet 模型并验证输出尺寸
content.checkpoint: 模型能正确前向传播，输入 [B, 3, 256, 256] 输出 [B, 21, 256, 256]，参数量约 31M
common_errors: 上采样时尺寸不匹配，skip connection 拼接失败
忘记在卷积后加 BatchNorm 和激活函数
最后输出卷积层使用了 3x3 卷积而不是 1x1 卷积
bilinear 模式下通道数计算错误导致维度不匹配
content.code:
```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class DoubleConv(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels):
        super().__init__()
        self.double_conv = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(out_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.double_conv(x)

class Down(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels):
        super().__init__()
        self.maxpool_conv = nn.Sequential(
            nn.MaxPool2d(2),
            DoubleConv(in_channels, out_channels)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.maxpool_conv(x)

class Up(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, bilinear=True):
        super().__init__()
        if bilinear:
            self.up = nn.Upsample(scale_factor=2, mode='bilinear', align_corners=True)
            self.conv = DoubleConv(in_channels, out_channels)
        else:
            self.up = nn.ConvTranspose2d(in_channels, in_channels // 2, kernel_size=2, stride=2)
            self.conv = DoubleConv(in_channels, out_channels)
    
    def forward(self, x1, x2):
        x1 = self.up(x1)
        diffY = x2.size()[2] - x1.size()[2]
        diffX = x2.size()[3] - x1.size()[3]
        x1 = F.pad(x1, [diffX // 2, diffX - diffX // 2, diffY // 2, diffY - diffY // 2])
        x = torch.cat([x2, x1], dim=1)
        return self.conv(x)

class UNet(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, n_channels=3, n_classes=21, bilinear=True):
        super().__init__()
        self.n_channels = n_channels
        self.n_classes = n_classes
        self.bilinear = bilinear
        
        self.inc = DoubleConv(n_channels, 64)
        self.down1 = Down(64, 128)
        self.down2 = Down(128, 256)
        self.down3 = Down(256, 512)
        factor = 2 if bilinear else 1
        self.down4 = Down(512, 1024 // factor)
        
        self.up1 = Up(1024, 512 // factor, bilinear)
        self.up2 = Up(512, 256 // factor, bilinear)
        self.up3 = Up(256, 128 // factor, bilinear)
        self.up4 = Up(128, 64, bilinear)
        self.outc = nn.Conv2d(64, n_classes, kernel_size=1)
    
    def forward(self, x):
        x1 = self.inc(x)
        x2 = self.down1(x1)
        x3 = self.down2(x2)
        x4 = self.down3(x3)
        x5 = self.down4(x4)
        
        x = self.up1(x5, x4)
        x = self.up2(x, x3)
        x = self.up3(x, x2)
        x = self.up4(x, x1)
        logits = self.outc(x)
        return logits
```

content.objective: 实现完整的训练循环，包括损失函数（CrossEntropy + Dice Loss）、mIoU 评估、模型保存与加载，能够训练 UNet 模型
tasks: 实现 Dice Loss 和联合损失函数
实现 mIoU 计算函数
实现训练循环与验证循环
添加学习率调度器和模型保存逻辑
训练 UNet 模型并监控训练过程
content.checkpoint: 训练循环正常运行，loss 持续下降，验证集 mIoU 逐步提升，10 个 epoch 后 mIoU > 0.5
common_errors: 计算 mIoU 时忘记排除 ignore_index（如 255）
Dice Loss 没有对预测做 softmax 归一化
验证阶段忘记设置 model.eval() 和 torch.no_grad()
学习率设置过高导致训练不稳定或不收敛
content.code:
```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from tqdm import tqdm
import numpy as np

def dice_loss(pred, target, smooth=1e-6, ignore_index=255):
    pred = F.softmax(pred, dim=1)
    target_one_hot = F.one_hot(target.clamp(max=pred.size(1)-1), pred.size(1)).permute(0, 3, 1, 2).float()
    
    # 创建忽略掩码
    mask = (target != ignore_index).unsqueeze(1).float()
    
    # 应用掩码
    pred = pred * mask
    target_one_hot = target_one_hot * mask
    
    intersection = (pred * target_one_hot).sum(dim=(2, 3))
    union = pred.sum(dim=(2, 3)) + target_one_hot.sum(dim=(2, 3))
    
    dice = (2. * intersection + smooth) / (union + smooth)
    return 1 - dice.mean()

class CombinedLoss(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, ce_weight=1.0, dice_weight=1.0, ignore_index=255):
        super().__init__()
        self.ce_weight = ce_weight
        self.dice_weight = dice_weight
        self.ignore_index = ignore_index
        self.ce_loss = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(ignore_index=ignore_index)
    
    def forward(self, pred, target):
        ce = self.ce_loss(pred, target)
        dl = dice_loss(pred, target, ignore_index=self.ignore_index)
        return self.ce_weight * ce + self.dice_weight * dl

def compute_miou(pred, target, num_classes, ignore_index=255):
    pred = pred.argmax(dim=1).flatten()
    target = target.flatten()
    
    mask = target != ignore_index
    pred = pred[mask]
    target = target[mask]
    
    ious = []
    for cls in range(num_classes):
        pred_cls = pred == cls
        target_cls = target == cls
        
        intersection = (pred_cls & target_cls).sum().float()
        union = (pred_cls | target_cls).sum().float()
        
        if union > 0:
            ious.append((intersection / union).item())
    
    return np.mean(ious) if ious else 0.0

def train_one_epoch(model, dataloader, criterion, optimizer, device, num_classes):
    model.train()
    total_loss = 0
    total_miou = 0
    
    pbar = tqdm(dataloader, desc='Training')
    for imgs, masks in pbar:
        imgs = imgs.to(device)
        masks = masks.to(device)
        
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        outputs = model(imgs)
        loss = criterion(outputs, masks)
        loss.backward()
        optimizer.step()
        
        miou = compute_miou(outputs, masks, num_classes)
        total_loss += loss.item()
        total_miou += miou
        
        pbar.set_postfix({'loss': f'{loss.item():.4f}', 'miou': f'{miou:.4f}'})
    
    return total_loss / len(dataloader), total_miou / len(dataloader)
```

content.objective: 理解空洞卷积（Atrous Convolution）的原理，实现 ASPP 模块和 DeepLabV3+ 模型，掌握骨干网络特征提取方法
tasks: 理解空洞卷积的原理和感受野计算
实现 ASPP（Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling）模块
使用 ResNet 作为骨干网络提取特征
实现 DeepLabV3+ 的编码器-解码器结构
对比 UNet 和 DeepLabV3+ 的性能差异
content.checkpoint: DeepLabV3+ 模型能正确前向传播，在相同数据集上 mIoU 优于 UNet，验证 mIoU > 0.6
common_errors: 空洞卷积的 padding 和 dilation 设置错误，导致输出尺寸不对
修改 ResNet 为空洞卷积时遗漏了 downsample 层的 stride 修改
ASPP 中全局池化后的上采样尺寸计算错误
低级特征和高级特征融合时通道数不匹配
content.code:
```python
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torchvision import models

class ASPP(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels=256, rates=[6, 12, 18]):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv1x1 = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
        )
        
        self.atrous_convs = nn.ModuleList()
        for rate in rates:
            self.atrous_convs.append(nn.Sequential(
                nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, 3, padding=rate, dilation=rate, bias=False),
                nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
                nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
            ))
        
        self.pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d(1),
            nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
        )
        
        self.project = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(out_channels * (len(rates) + 2), out_channels, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.5)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        features = [self.conv1x1(x)]
        
        for conv in self.atrous_convs:
            features.append(conv(x))
        
        x_pool = self.pool(x)
        x_pool = F.interpolate(x_pool, size=x.shape[2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=True)
        features.append(x_pool)
        
        x = torch.cat(features, dim=1)
        return self.project(x)

class DeepLabV3Plus(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=21, backbone_name='resnet50', pretrained=True):
        super().__init__()
        
        if backbone_name == 'resnet50':
            backbone = models.resnet50(pretrained=pretrained)
            low_channels = 256
            high_channels = 2048
        elif backbone_name == 'resnet101':
            backbone = models.resnet101(pretrained=pretrained)
            low_channels = 256
            high_channels = 2048
        else:
            raise ValueError(f'Unsupported backbone: {backbone_name}')
        
        self.layer0 = nn.Sequential(backbone.conv1, backbone.bn1, backbone.relu, backbone.maxpool)
        self.layer1 = backbone.layer1
        self.layer2 = backbone.layer2
        self.layer3 = backbone.layer3
        self.layer4 = backbone.layer4
        
        for n, m in self.layer3.named_modules():
            if 'conv2' in n:
                m.dilation, m.padding, m.stride = (2, 2), (2, 2), (1, 1)
            elif 'downsample.0' in n:
                m.stride = (1, 1)
        for n, m in self.layer4.named_modules():
            if 'conv2' in n:
                m.dilation, m.padding, m.stride = (4, 4), (4, 4), (1, 1)
            elif 'downsample.0' in n:
                m.stride = (1, 1)
        
        self.aspp = ASPP(high_channels, 256, rates=[6, 12, 18])
        
        self.low_conv = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(low_channels, 48, 1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(48),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
        )
        
        self.decoder = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(256 + 48, 256, 3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(256),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Conv2d(256, 256, 3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(256),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.5)
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Conv2d(256, num_classes, 1)
    
    def forward(self, x):
        input_size = x.shape[2:]
        
        x0 = self.layer0(x)
        x1 = self.layer1(x0)
        x2 = self.layer2(x1)
        x3 = self.layer3(x2)
        x4 = self.layer4(x3)
        
        x_aspp = self.aspp(x4)
        x_aspp = F.interpolate(x_aspp, size=x1.shape[2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=True)
        
        x_low = self.low_conv(x1)
        
        x = torch.cat([x_aspp, x_low], dim=1)
        x = self.decoder(x)
        x = self.classifier(x)
        
        x = F.interpolate(x, size=input_size, mode='bilinear', align_corners=True)
        return x
```

```python
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import cv2

def preprocess_image(image, transform):
    if isinstance(image, str):
        image = Image.open(image).convert('RGB')
    image = np.array(image)
    augmented = transform(image=image)
    return augmented['image'].unsqueeze(0)

def predict(model, image, transform, device, num_classes=21):
    model.eval()
    input_tensor = preprocess_image(image, transform).to(device)
    
    with torch.no_grad():
        output = model(input_tensor)
        output = F.softmax(output, dim=1)
        pred_mask = output.argmax(dim=1).squeeze(0).cpu().numpy()
    
    return pred_mask

def predict_sliding_window(model, image, transform, device, window_size=256, stride=128, num_classes=21):
    model.eval()
    image_np = np.array(image) if isinstance(image, Image.Image) else image
    h, w = image_np.shape[:2]
    
    full_pred = np.zeros((num_classes, h, w), dtype=np.float32)
    count = np.zeros((1, h, w), dtype=np.float32)
    
    for y in range(0, h, stride):
        for x in range(0, w, stride):
            y_end = min(y + window_size, h)
            x_end = min(x + window_size, w)
            y_start = max(y_end - window_size, 0)
            x_start = max(x_end - window_size, 0)
            
            crop = image_np[y_start:y_end, x_start:x_end]
            augmented = transform(image=crop)
            input_tensor = augmented['image'].unsqueeze(0).to(device)
            
            with torch.no_grad():
                output = model(input_tensor)
                output = F.softmax(output, dim=1).squeeze(0).cpu().numpy()
            
            full_pred[:, y_start:y_end, x_start:x_end] += output
            count[:, y_start:y_end, x_start:x_end] += 1
    
    full_pred /= count
    pred_mask = full_pred.argmax(axis=0)
    return pred_mask

def visualize_result(image, pred_mask, true_mask=None, class_names=None, save_path=None):
    if isinstance(image, str):
        image = Image.open(image).convert('RGB')
    image = np.array(image)
    
    num_plots = 2 if true_mask is None else 3
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, num_plots, figsize=(5 * num_plots, 5))
    
    axes[0].imshow(image)
    axes[0].set_title('Original Image')
    axes[0].axis('off')
    
    pred_colored = decode_segmap(pred_mask, class_names)
    axes[1].imshow(pred_colored)
    axes[1].set_title('Prediction')
    axes[1].axis('off')
    
    if true_mask is not None:
        true_colored = decode_segmap(true_mask, class_names)
        axes[2].imshow(true_colored)
        axes[2].set_title('Ground Truth')
        axes[2].axis('off')
    
    plt.tight_layout()
    if save_path:
        plt.savefig(save_path, bbox_inches='tight', dpi=150)
    plt.show()

VOC_COLORMAP = np.array([
    [0, 0, 0], [128, 0, 0], [0, 128, 0], [128, 128, 0], [0, 0, 128],
    [128, 0, 128], [0, 128, 128], [128, 128, 128], [64, 0, 0], [192, 0, 0],
    [64, 128, 0], [192, 128, 0], [64, 0, 128], [192, 0, 128], [64, 128, 128],
    [192, 128, 128], [0, 64, 0], [128, 64, 0], [0, 192, 0], [128, 192, 0],
    [0, 64, 128]
])

def decode_segmap(mask, class_names=None):
    h, w = mask.shape
    rgb = np.zeros((h, w, 3), dtype=np.uint8)
    for i in range(len(VOC_COLORMAP)):
        rgb[mask == i] = VOC_COLORMAP[i]
    return rgb
```

```python
# Step 1: Gymnasium 环境入门
# 代码 1-1: 安装并验证 Gymnasium
# 运行以下命令安装 Gymnasium:
# pip install gymnasium[classic_control]

import gymnasium as gym
print(f"Gymnasium 版本: {gym.__version__}")

# 代码 1-2: 创建 CartPole 环境并了解观测空间和动作空间
env = gym.make('CartPole-v1')

# 查看观测空间 - 4维连续空间: [位置, 速度, 角度, 角速度]
print(f"\n观测空间: {env.observation_space}")
print(f"观测空间下限: {env.observation_space.low}")
print(f"观测空间上限: {env.observation_space.high}")

# 查看动作空间 - 离散动作空间: 0(向左) 或 1(向右)
print(f"\n动作空间: {env.action_space}")
print(f"动作空间大小: {env.action_space.n}")

# 代码 1-3: 随机策略交互 - 理解强化学习基本循环
print("\n=== 随机策略交互 ===")
state, info = env.reset()
total_reward = 0
for step in range(100):
    # 随机选择动作
    action = env.action_space.sample()
    # 与环境交互
    next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.step(action)
    total_reward += reward
    # 判断是否结束
    if terminated or truncated:
        print(f"回合结束! 步数: {step + 1}, 总奖励: {total_reward}")
        break
env.close()

# 代码 1-4: 环境交互核心循环解析 - reset() 和 step() 返回值详解
print("\n=== reset() 和 step() 返回值详解 ===")
env = gym.make('CartPole-v1', render_mode='human')
state, info = env.reset()
print(f"reset() 返回:")
print(f"  - state: {state} (初始观测)")
print(f"  - info: {info} (辅助信息)")

action = 0
next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.step(action)
print(f"\nstep({action}) 返回:")
print(f"  - next_state: {next_state} (下一个观测)")
print(f"  - reward: {reward} (奖励值)")
print(f"  - terminated: {terminated} (是否自然结束，如摔倒)")
print(f"  - truncated: {truncated} (是否被截断，如超出步数限制)")
print(f"  - info: {info} (辅助信息)")
print(f"\n当 terminated 或 truncated 为 True 时，需要调用 reset() 重置环境")

env.close()
print("\n环境交互流程: reset() -> step() -> step() -> ... -> reset()")
```

content.code:
```python
# Step 2: Q-Learning 表格法实现
import gymnasium as gym
import numpy as np

# 代码 2-1: 探索 FrozenLake 环境
print("=== 探索 FrozenLake 环境 ===")
env = gym.make('FrozenLake-v1', desc=None, map_name="4x4", is_slippery=False)

# FrozenLake 是一个 4x4 的格子世界
# S: 起点, G: 目标, H: 洞, F: 冰面
print(f"观测空间: {env.observation_space}")  # Discrete(16) - 16个状态
print(f"动作空间: {env.action_space}")  # Discrete(4) - 4个动作: 左/下/右/上
print(f"动作含义: 0=左, 1=下, 2=右, 3=上")

# 渲染环境查看布局
print("\n环境布局 (4x4):")
env.reset()
# 使用 render 模式查看环境
env.close()

# 代码 2-2: Q-Learning 算法完整实现
class QLearningAgent:
    def __init__(self, state_space, action_space, learning_rate=0.1, gamma=0.99, epsilon=1.0, epsilon_decay=0.99, epsilon_min=0.01):
        self.lr = learning_rate  # 学习率
        self.gamma = gamma  # 折扣因子
        self.epsilon = epsilon  # 探索率
        self.epsilon_decay = epsilon_decay
        self.epsilon_min = epsilon_min
        self.action_space = action_space
        # 初始化 Q 表格为 0
        self.q_table = np.zeros((state_space, action_space))

    def choose_action(self, state):
        # Epsilon-greedy 策略
        if np.random.random() < self.epsilon:
            return self.action_space.sample()  # 探索
        return np.argmax(self.q_table[state])  # 利用

    def update(self, state, action, reward, next_state, done):
        # Q-Learning 更新规则
        current_q = self.q_table[state, action]
        if done:
            target_q = reward
        else:
            target_q = reward + self.gamma * np.max(self.q_table[next_state])
        self.q_table[state, action] += self.lr * (target_q - current_q)

    def decay_epsilon(self):
        if self.epsilon > self.epsilon_min:
            self.epsilon *= self.epsilon_decay

# 训练 Q-Learning 智能体
print("\n=== 训练 Q-Learning 智能体 ===")
env = gym.make('FrozenLake-v1', map_name="4x4", is_slippery=False)
agent = QLearningAgent(env.observation_space.n, env.action_space.n)

episodes = 1000
max_steps = 100
rewards_history = []

for episode in range(episodes):
    state, info = env.reset()
    total_reward = 0
    for step in range(max_steps):
        action = agent.choose_action(state)
        next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.step(action)
        agent.update(state, action, reward, next_state, terminated)
        state = next_state
        total_reward += reward
        if terminated or truncated:
            break
    agent.decay_epsilon()
    rewards_history.append(total_reward)
    if (episode + 1) % 100 == 0:
        avg_reward = np.mean(rewards_history[-100:])
        print(f"回合 {episode + 1}/{episodes}, 平均奖励: {avg_reward:.2f}, epsilon: {agent.epsilon:.4f}")

env.close()

# 代码 2-3: 测试训练好的智能体
print("\n=== 测试训练好的 Q-Learning 智能体 ===")
test_env = gym.make('FrozenLake-v1', map_name="4x4", is_slippery=False, render_mode='human')

for episode in range(5):
    state, info = test_env.reset()
    terminated = False
    truncated = False
    print(f"\n回合 {episode + 1}:")
    while not (terminated or truncated):
        action = np.argmax(agent.q_table[state])  # 使用学到的策略
        state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = test_env.step(action)
        print(f"  状态: {state}, 动作: {['左','下','右','上'][action]}, 奖励: {reward}")
    print(f"  结果: {'成功到达目标!' if reward == 1 else '掉进洞里了...'}")

test_env.close()

# 代码 2-4: 挑战性练习 - 在 slippery 版本上训练
print("\n=== 挑战性练习: 有滑版本 FrozenLake-v1 (slippery=True) ===")
env_slippery = gym.make('FrozenLake-v1', map_name="4x4", is_slippery=True)
agent_slippery = QLearningAgent(env_slippery.observation_space.n, env_slippery.action_space.n, learning_rate=0.2)

episodes = 5000
for episode in range(episodes):
    state, info = env_slippery.reset()
    for step in range(100):
        action = agent_slippery.choose_action(state)
        next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env_slippery.step(action)
        agent_slippery.update(state, action, reward, next_state, terminated)
        state = next_state
        if terminated or truncated:
            break
    agent_slippery.decay_epsilon()
    if (episode + 1) % 500 == 0:
        print(f"回合 {episode + 1}/{episodes}, epsilon: {agent_slippery.epsilon:.4f}")

env_slippery.close()
print("\n提示: slippery 版本由于随机性更难学习，可以尝试增加训练回合或调整超参数")
```

content.objective: 实现深度 Q 网络 (DQN)，使用神经网络近似 Q 值函数，引入经验回放和目标网络两大核心技巧，解决 CartPole 问题
tasks: 构建经验回放缓冲区: 实现 Replay Buffer，用于存储和采样经验数据
构建 DQN 神经网络: 使用 PyTorch 构建 Q 网络模型
实现 DQN 训练循环: 整合所有组件，实现完整的 DQN 训练算法
测试 DQN 智能体: 可视化测试训练好的 DQN 智能体
content.code:
```python
# Step 3: DQN 深度 Q 网络
import gymnasium as gym
import numpy as np
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.optim as optim
import random
from collections import deque

# 代码 3-1: 经验回放缓冲区 (Replay Buffer) 实现
class ReplayBuffer:
    def __init__(self, capacity=10000):
        self.buffer = deque(maxlen=capacity)

    def push(self, state, action, reward, next_state, done):
        self.buffer.append((state, action, reward, next_state, done))

    def sample(self, batch_size):
        batch = random.sample(self.buffer, batch_size)
        states, actions, rewards, next_states, dones = zip(*batch)
        return (
            np.array(states),
            np.array(actions),
            np.array(rewards),
            np.array(next_states),
            np.array(dones)
        )

    def __len__(self):
        return len(self.buffer)

# 代码 3-2: DQN 神经网络模型定义
class QNetwork(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, state_dim, action_dim, hidden_dim=128):
        super(QNetwork, self).__init__()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(state_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.fc3 = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, action_dim)

    def forward(self, x):
        x = torch.relu(self.fc1(x))
        x = torch.relu(self.fc2(x))
        return self.fc3(x)

# 代码 3-3: DQN 智能体类
class DQNAgent:
    def __init__(self, state_dim, action_dim, learning_rate=1e-3, gamma=0.99, epsilon=1.0, epsilon_decay=0.995, epsilon_min=0.01, target_update_freq=10):
        self.action_dim = action_dim
        self.gamma = gamma
        self.epsilon = epsilon
        self.epsilon_decay = epsilon_decay
        self.epsilon_min = epsilon_min
        self.target_update_freq = target_update_freq
        self.update_counter = 0

        # 主 Q 网络
        self.q_network = QNetwork(state_dim, action_dim)
        # 目标 Q 网络
        self.target_network = QNetwork(state_dim, action_dim)
        self.target_network.load_state_dict(self.q_network.state_dict())

        self.optimizer = optim.Adam(self.q_network.parameters(), lr=learning_rate)
        self.replay_buffer = ReplayBuffer(capacity=10000)

    def choose_action(self, state):
        if np.random.random() < self.epsilon:
            return np.random.randint(self.action_dim)
        state = torch.FloatTensor(state).unsqueeze(0)
        with torch.no_grad():
            q_values = self.q_network(state)
        return q_values.argmax().item()

    def store_transition(self, state, action, reward, next_state, done):
        self.replay_buffer.push(state, action, reward, next_state, done)

    def update(self, batch_size):
        if len(self.replay_buffer) < batch_size:
            return

        states, actions, rewards, next_states, dones = self.replay_buffer.sample(batch_size)
        states = torch.FloatTensor(states)
        actions = torch.LongTensor(actions)
        rewards = torch.FloatTensor(rewards)
        next_states = torch.FloatTensor(next_states)
        dones = torch.FloatTensor(dones)

        # 计算当前 Q 值
        q_values = self.q_network(states).gather(1, actions.unsqueeze(1)).squeeze()

        # 计算目标 Q 值 (使用目标网络)
        with torch.no_grad():
            next_q_values = self.target_network(next_states).max(1)[0]
            target_q_values = rewards + (1 - dones) * self.gamma * next_q_values

        # 计算损失并更新
        loss = nn.MSELoss()(q_values, target_q_values)
        self.optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        self.optimizer.step()

        # 更新目标网络
        self.update_counter += 1
        if self.update_counter % self.target_update_freq == 0:
            self.target_network.load_state_dict(self.q_network.state_dict())

        # 衰减探索率
        if self.epsilon > self.epsilon_min:
            self.epsilon *= self.epsilon_decay

        return loss.item()

# 代码 3-4: DQN 训练循环
def train_dqn(env, agent, num_episodes=500, batch_size=64, max_steps=500):
    rewards_history = []
    losses = []

    for episode in range(num_episodes):
        state, info = env.reset()
        total_reward = 0
        episode_loss = []

        for step in range(max_steps):
            action = agent.choose_action(state)
            next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.step(action)
            done = terminated or truncated

            agent.store_transition(state, action, reward, next_state, done)
            loss = agent.update(batch_size)
            if loss is not None:
                episode_loss.append(loss)

            state = next_state
            total_reward += reward

            if done:
                break

        rewards_history.append(total_reward)
        if episode_loss:
            losses.append(np.mean(episode_loss))

        if (episode + 1) % 10 == 0:
            avg_reward = np.mean(rewards_history[-10:])
            print(f"回合 {episode + 1}/{num_episodes}, 平均奖励: {avg_reward:.2f}, epsilon: {agent.epsilon:.4f}")

        if avg_reward >= 450:
            print(f"\n环境已解决! 连续10回合平均奖励 >= 450")
            break

    return rewards_history, losses

# 主训练流程
print("=== DQN 训练 CartPole-v1 ===")
env = gym.make('CartPole-v1')
state_dim = env.observation_space.shape[0]
action_dim = env.action_space.n

agent = DQNAgent(state_dim, action_dim)
rewards, losses = train_dqn(env, agent, num_episodes=500)

env.close()

# 代码 3-5: 测试 DQN 智能体
print("\n=== 测试训练好的 DQN 智能体 ===")
test_env = gym.make('CartPole-v1', render_mode='human')

for episode in range(3):
    state, info = test_env.reset()
    terminated = False
    truncated = False
    total_reward = 0

    while not (terminated or truncated):
        action = agent.choose_action(state)
        state, reward, terminated, truncated, info = test_env.step(action)
        total_reward += reward

    print(f"回合 {episode + 1}: 获得奖励 {total_reward}")

test_env.close()

# 代码 3-6: 绘制训练曲线 (需要 matplotlib)
try:
    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))

    # 奖励曲线
    axes[0].plot(rewards)
    axes[0].set_xlabel('Episode')
    axes[0].set_ylabel('Reward')
    axes[0].set_title('DQN Training Reward')
    axes[0].rolling_mean = 10

    # 损失曲线
    axes[1].plot(losses)
    axes[1].set_xlabel('Episode')
    axes[1].set_ylabel('Loss')
    axes[1].set_title('DQN Training Loss')

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig('dqn_training_curve.png')
    plt.show()
    print("\n训练曲线已保存到 dqn_training_curve.png")
except ImportError:
    print("\n提示: 安装 matplotlib 可以绘制训练曲线: pip install matplotlib")
```

content.code:
```python
"""
DQN 训练主程序
使用 Gymnasium CartPole-v1 环境
"""
import gymnasium as gym
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.optim as optim
import numpy as np
import random
from collections import deque
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import os

# ============ 4.1 Q网络定义 ============
class DQN(nn.Module):
    """
    Deep Q-Network
    输入: 状态 (4维)
    输出: 每个动作的Q值 (2维)
    """
    def __init__(self, state_dim, action_dim, hidden_dim=128):
        super().__init__()
        self.net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(state_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, action_dim)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.net(x)

# ============ 4.2 经验回放缓冲区 ============
class ReplayBuffer:
    """经验回放缓冲区"""
    def __init__(self, capacity=10000):
        self.buffer = deque(maxlen=capacity)
    
    def push(self, state, action, reward, next_state, done):
        self.buffer.append((state, action, reward, next_state, done))
    
    def sample(self, batch_size):
        batch = random.sample(self.buffer, batch_size)
        states, actions, rewards, next_states, dones = zip(*batch)
        return (
            torch.FloatTensor(np.array(states)),
            torch.LongTensor(actions),
            torch.FloatTensor(rewards),
            torch.FloatTensor(np.array(next_states)),
            torch.FloatTensor(dones)
        )
    
    def __len__(self):
        return len(self.buffer)

# ============ 4.3 DQN Agent ============
class DQNAgent:
    """DQN智能体"""
    def __init__(self, state_dim, action_dim, device='cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'):
        self.device = device
        self.action_dim = action_dim
        
        # 当前网络和目标网络
        self.policy_net = DQN(state_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.target_net = DQN(state_dim, action_dim).to(device)
        self.target_net.load_state_dict(self.policy_net.state_dict())
        
        self.optimizer = optim.Adam(self.policy_net.parameters(), lr=1e-3)
        self.criterion = nn.MSELoss()
        
        # 经验回放
        self.replay_buffer = ReplayBuffer(10000)
        self.batch_size = 64
        self.gamma = 0.99
        
        # epsilon-greedy
        self.epsilon = 1.0
        self.epsilon_min = 0.01
        self.epsilon_decay = 0.995
        
        # 目标网络更新频率
        self.target_update_freq = 100
        self.update_count = 0
    
    def select_action(self, state):
        """epsilon-greedy策略选择动作"""
        if random.random() < self.epsilon:
            return random.randint(0, self.action_dim - 1)
        else:
            state = torch.FloatTensor(state).unsqueeze(0).to(self.device)
            with torch.no_grad():
                q_values = self.policy_net(state)
            return q_values.argmax().item()
    
    def train_step(self):
        """训练一步"""
        if len(self.replay_buffer) < self.batch_size:
            return 0.0
        
        states, actions, rewards, next_states, dones = self.replay_buffer.sample(self.batch_size)
        states = states.to(self.device)
        actions = actions.to(self.device)
        rewards = rewards.to(self.device)
        next_states = next_states.to(self.device)
        dones = dones.to(self.device)
        
        # 当前Q值
        current_q = self.policy_net(states).gather(1, actions.unsqueeze(1)).squeeze(1)
        
        # 目标Q值
        with torch.no_grad():
            next_q = self.target_net(next_states).max(1)[0]
            target_q = rewards + self.gamma * next_q * (1 - dones)
        
        # 计算损失
        loss = self.criterion(current_q, target_q)
        
        # 反向传播
        self.optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        self.optimizer.step()
        
        # 更新目标网络
        self.update_count += 1
        if self.update_count % self.target_update_freq == 0:
            self.target_net.load_state_dict(self.policy_net.state_dict())
        
        return loss.item()

# ============ 4.4 主训练循环 ============
def train_dqn(env_name='CartPole-v1', num_episodes=500, max_steps=500):
    """训练DQN"""
    env = gym.make(env_name)
    state_dim = env.observation_space.shape[0]
    action_dim = env.action_space.n
    
    agent = DQNAgent(state_dim, action_dim)
    
    episode_rewards = []
    avg_rewards = []
    
    for episode in range(num_episodes):
        state, _ = env.reset()
        total_reward = 0
        
        for step in range(max_steps):
            action = agent.select_action(state)
            next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, _ = env.step(action)
            done = terminated or truncated
            
            agent.replay_buffer.push(state, action, reward, next_state, done)
            agent.train_step()
            
            state = next_state
            total_reward += reward
            
            if done:
                break
        
        # 衰减epsilon
        if agent.epsilon > agent.epsilon_min:
            agent.epsilon *= agent.epsilon_decay
        
        episode_rewards.append(total_reward)
        avg_reward = np.mean(episode_rewards[-50:])
        avg_rewards.append(avg_reward)
        
        if (episode + 1) % 50 == 0:
            print(f"Episode {episode+1}/{num_episodes}, Reward: {total_reward:.1f}, Avg(50): {avg_reward:.1f}, Epsilon: {agent.epsilon:.3f}")
        
        # 提前停止：连续50回合达到475分以上
        if avg_reward >= 475.0:
            print(f"Environment solved in {episode+1} episodes!")
            break
    
    # 保存模型
    os.makedirs('models', exist_ok=True)
    torch.save(agent.policy_net.state_dict(), 'models/dqn_cartpole.pth')
    print("Model saved to models/dqn_cartpole.pth")
    
    return agent, episode_rewards, avg_rewards

# ============ 4.5 训练可视化 ============
def plot_training_curves(episode_rewards, avg_rewards):
    """绘制训练曲线"""
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
    plt.plot(episode_rewards, alpha=0.3, label='Episode Reward')
    plt.plot(avg_rewards, label='Moving Average (50)')
    plt.xlabel('Episode')
    plt.ylabel('Reward')
    plt.title('DQN Training Curve - CartPole-v1')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.savefig('dqn_training_curve.png', dpi=150)
    plt.show()

# 运行训练
if __name__ == '__main__':
    agent, rewards, avg_rewards = train_dqn()
    plot_training_curves(rewards, avg_rewards)
```

```python
"""
DQN 模型评估与可视化
"""
import gymnasium as gym
import torch
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from collections import deque
import os
import random

# 复用Step4中的DQN网络定义
class DQN(torch.nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, state_dim, action_dim, hidden_dim=128):
        super().__init__()
        self.net = torch.nn.Sequential(
            torch.nn.Linear(state_dim, hidden_dim),
            torch.nn.ReLU(),
            torch.nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            torch.nn.ReLU(),
            torch.nn.Linear(hidden_dim, action_dim)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        return self.net(x)

# ============ 5.1 模型加载与评估 ============
def load_and_evaluate(model_path='models/dqn_cartpole.pth', num_episodes=10):
    """加载模型并评估"""
    env = gym.make('CartPole-v1', render_mode='rgb_array')
    state_dim = env.observation_space.shape[0]
    action_dim = env.action_space.n
    
    # 加载模型
    model = DQN(state_dim, action_dim)
    if os.path.exists(model_path):
        model.load_state_dict(torch.load(model_path, map_location='cpu'))
        print(f"Loaded model from {model_path}")
    else:
        print(f"Warning: {model_path} not found, using random weights")
    model.eval()
    
    episode_rewards = []
    
    for episode in range(num_episodes):
        state, _ = env.reset()
        total_reward = 0
        frames = []
        
        while True:
            # 贪心策略（无探索）
            state_tensor = torch.FloatTensor(state).unsqueeze(0)
            with torch.no_grad():
                q_values = model(state_tensor)
            action = q_values.argmax().item()
            
            next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, _ = env.step(action)
            done = terminated or truncated
            
            frame = env.render()
            frames.append(frame)
            
            state = next_state
            total_reward += reward
            
            if done:
                break
        
        episode_rewards.append(total_reward)
        print(f"Episode {episode+1}: Reward = {total_reward:.1f}, Steps = {len(frames)}")
    
    env.close()
    
    avg_reward = np.mean(episode_rewards)
    std_reward = np.std(episode_rewards)
    print(f"\nEvaluation Results ({num_episodes} episodes):")
    print(f"  Average Reward: {avg_reward:.2f} +/- {std_reward:.2f}")
    print(f"  Max Reward: {max(episode_rewards):.1f}")
    print(f"  Min Reward: {min(episode_rewards):.1f}")
    
    return model, episode_rewards

# ============ 5.2 超参数对比实验 ============
def compare_learning_rates(lrs=[1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 5e-3], num_episodes=200):
    """对比不同学习率的效果"""
    results = {}
    
    for lr in lrs:
        print(f"\nTraining with lr={lr}...")
        env = gym.make('CartPole-v1')
        state_dim = env.observation_space.shape[0]
        action_dim = env.action_space.n
        
        model = DQN(state_dim, action_dim)
        optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=lr)
        criterion = torch.nn.MSELoss()
        
        replay_buffer = deque(maxlen=10000)
        epsilon = 1.0
        gamma = 0.99
        batch_size = 64
        
        rewards_history = []
        
        for episode in range(num_episodes):
            state, _ = env.reset()
            total_reward = 0
            
            for step in range(500):
                if random.random() < epsilon:
                    action = env.action_space.sample()
                else:
                    with torch.no_grad():
                        q = model(torch.FloatTensor(state).unsqueeze(0))
                    action = q.argmax().item()
                
                next_state, reward, terminated, truncated, _ = env.step(action)
                done = terminated or truncated
                
                replay_buffer.append((state, action, reward, next_state, done))
                state = next_state
                total_reward += reward
                
                # 训练
                if len(replay_buffer) >= batch_size:
                    batch = random.sample(replay_buffer, batch_size)
                    s, a, r, ns, d = zip(*batch)
                    
                    s_t = torch.FloatTensor(np.array(s))
                    a_t = torch.LongTensor(a)
                    r_t = torch.FloatTensor(r)
                    ns_t = torch.FloatTensor(np.array(ns))
                    d_t = torch.FloatTensor(d)
                    
                    current_q = model(s_t).gather(1, a_t.unsqueeze(1)).squeeze(1)
                    with torch.no_grad():
                        next_q = model(ns_t).max(1)[0]
                    target_q = r_t + gamma * next_q * (1 - d_t)
                    
                    loss = criterion(current_q, target_q)
                    optimizer.zero_grad()
                    loss.backward()
                    optimizer.step()
                
                if done:
                    break
            
            if epsilon > 0.01:
                epsilon *= 0.995
            
            rewards_history.append(total_reward)
        
        env.close()
        results[f'lr={lr}'] = rewards_history
    
    # 绘制对比图
    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
    for label, rewards in results.items():
        # 滑动平均
        avg = np.convolve(rewards, np.ones(20)/20, mode='valid')
        plt.plot(avg, label=label)
    plt.xlabel('Episode')
    plt.ylabel('Reward (Moving Avg)')
    plt.title('Learning Rate Comparison - DQN on CartPole')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.savefig('dqn_lr_comparison.png', dpi=150)
    plt.show()
    
    return results

# ============ 5.3 Q值可视化 ============
def visualize_q_values(model, state_examples=None):
    """可视化Q值分布"""
    env = gym.make('CartPole-v1')
    
    if state_examples is None:
        # 生成一些代表性的状态
        state_examples = [
            np.array([0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]),       # 初始状态
            np.array([1.0, 0.5, 0.1, 0.2]),       # 偏右
            np.array([-1.0, -0.5, -0.1, -0.2]),   # 偏左
            np.array([2.0, 1.0, 0.3, 0.5]),       # 即将失败
        ]
    
    state_labels = [
        'Initial State',
        'Right Tilt',
        'Left Tilt',
        'Near Failure'
    ]
    
    q_left = []
    q_right = []
    
    model.eval()
    for state in state_examples:
        with torch.no_grad():
            q_values = model(torch.FloatTensor(state).unsqueeze(0))
        q_left.append(q_values[0, 0].item())
        q_right.append(q_values[0, 1].item())
    
    # 绘制柱状图
    x = np.arange(len(state_labels))
    width = 0.35
    
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
    bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, q_left, width, label='Q(Left)')
    bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, q_right, width, label='Q(Right)')
    
    ax.set_xlabel('States')
    ax.set_ylabel('Q Value')
    ax.set_title('Q-Value Comparison for Different States')
    ax.set_xticks(x)
    ax.set_xticklabels(state_labels)
    ax.legend()
    ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
    
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig('dqn_qvalue_visualization.png', dpi=150)
    plt.show()
    
    print("Q-Values for different states:")
    for i, label in enumerate(state_labels):
        best_action = 'Left' if q_left[i] > q_right[i] else 'Right'
        print(f"  {label}: Q_left={q_left[i]:.3f}, Q_right={q_right[i]:.3f} -> Best: {best_action}")

# 运行评估
if __name__ == '__main__':
    model, rewards = load_and_evaluate()
    visualize_q_values(model)
```

```python
"""
Step 1: PyTorch Geometric 安装与环境验证
"""
import sys
print(f"Python version: {sys.version}")

import torch
print(f"PyTorch version: {torch.__version__}")
print(f"CUDA available: {torch.cuda.is_available()}")
if torch.cuda.is_available():
    print(f"CUDA version: {torch.version.cuda}")
    print(f"GPU: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)}")

# 导入PyG
try:
    import torch_geometric
    from torch_geometric.data import Data
    print(f"\nPyTorch Geometric version: {torch_geometric.__version__}")
    
    # 创建一个简单的图数据对象
    # 节点特征: 3个节点, 每个节点有2维特征
    x = torch.tensor([[0, 1], [1, 0], [0, 0]], dtype=torch.float)
    
    # 边索引: 边 (0->1), (1->0), (1->2), (2->1)
    edge_index = torch.tensor([[0, 1, 1, 2],
                               [1, 0, 2, 1]], dtype=torch.long)
    
    # 边属性: 每条边的权重
    edge_attr = torch.tensor([[0.5], [0.5], [0.8], [0.8]], dtype=torch.float)
    
    # 节点标签
    y = torch.tensor([0, 1, 0], dtype=torch.long)
    
    # 创建图数据对象
    data = Data(x=x, edge_index=edge_index, edge_attr=edge_attr, y=y)
    
    print(f"\nGraph Data Object:")
    print(f"  节点数: {data.num_nodes}")
    print(f"  边数: {data.num_edges}")
    print(f"  节点特征维度: {data.num_features}")
    print(f"  边特征维度: {data.num_edge_features}")
    print(f"  类别数: {data.y.unique().numel()}")
    print(f"  有向图: {data.is_directed()}")
    print(f"  自环: {data.has_self_loops()}")
    print(f"  孤立节点: {data.has_isolated_nodes()}")
    print(f"\n  data.x shape: {data.x.shape}")
    print(f"  data.edge_index shape: {data.edge_index.shape}")
    print(f"  data.y shape: {data.y.shape}")
    
    print("\n✓ PyTorch Geometric 环境验证成功！")
    
except ImportError as e:
    print(f"\n❌ PyTorch Geometric 未安装: {e}")
    print("\n请运行以下命令安装:")
    print("  pip install torch_geometric")
    print("  pip install torch_scatter torch_sparse torch_cluster torch_spline_conv -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-{version}.html")
```

```python
import torch
import torch_geometric
from torch_geometric.datasets import Planetoid
from torch_geometric.utils import to_networkx
import networkx as nx
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# ============ 2.1 加载Cora数据集 ============
print("加载 Cora 数据集...")
dataset = Planetoid(root='data/Cora', name='Cora')

print(f"\n数据集信息:")

print(f"  图数量: {len(dataset)}")

data = dataset[0]
print(f"\n图结构信息:")

print(f"  边数: {data.num_edges}")

# 类别分布
labels = data.y.numpy()
classes, counts = np.unique(labels, return_counts=True)
print(f"\n类别分布:")
for cls, count in zip(classes, counts):
    print(f"  Class {cls}: {count} nodes ({count/len(labels)*100:.1f}%)")

# ============ 2.2 图结构统计 ============
print(f"\n图统计特性:")

# 计算度数
edge_index = data.edge_index.numpy()
degrees = np.zeros(data.num_nodes, dtype=int)
for i in range(edge_index.shape[1]):
    degrees[edge_index[0, i]] += 1

print(f"  平均度数: {degrees.mean():.2f}")
print(f"  最大度数: {degrees.max()}")
print(f"  最小度数: {degrees.min()}")

# 度数分布
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
plt.hist(degrees, bins=50, alpha=0.7, color='steelblue', edgecolor='black')
plt.xlabel('Degree')
plt.ylabel('Number of Nodes')
plt.title('Degree Distribution - Cora Dataset')
plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.yscale('log')
plt.savefig('cora_degree_distribution.png', dpi=150)
plt.show()

# ============ 2.3 图可视化（子图采样） ============
def visualize_subgraph(data, num_nodes=100, seed=42):
    """可视化图的一个子图"""
    np.random.seed(seed)
    
    # 随机采样节点
    all_nodes = np.arange(data.num_nodes)
    selected_nodes = np.random.choice(all_nodes, size=min(num_nodes, data.num_nodes), replace=False)
    selected_set = set(selected_nodes.tolist())
    
    # 筛选这些节点之间的边
    edges_src = []
    edges_dst = []
    edge_index_np = data.edge_index.numpy()
    
    for i in range(edge_index_np.shape[1]):
        src, dst = edge_index_np[0, i], edge_index_np[1, i]
        if src in selected_set and dst in selected_set:
            edges_src.append(src)
            edges_dst.append(dst)
    
    print(f"\n子图信息:")
    print(f"  节点数: {len(selected_nodes)}")
    print(f"  边数: {len(edges_src)}")
    
    # 转换为NetworkX
    G = nx.Graph()
    for node in selected_nodes:
        G.add_node(node, label=data.y[node].item())
    for s, d in zip(edges_src, edges_dst):
        G.add_edge(s, d)
    
    # 布局
    pos = nx.spring_layout(G, k=1.5, iterations=50, seed=seed)
    
    # 绘制
    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 10))
    
    # 按类别着色
    colors = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12', '#9b59b6', '#1abc9c', '#e67e22']
    node_colors = [colors[data.y[node].item() % len(colors)] for node in G.nodes()]
    
    nx.draw_networkx_nodes(G, pos, node_color=node_colors, node_size=300, alpha=0.8)
    nx.draw_networkx_edges(G, pos, alpha=0.3, width=0.5)
    
    plt.title('Cora Citation Network Subgraph (colored by class)')
    plt.axis('off')
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig('cora_subgraph_visualization.png', dpi=150)
    plt.show()

# 可视化子图
visualize_subgraph(data, num_nodes=150)

print("\n✓ 数据集加载与可视化完成！")
```

import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch_geometric.nn import GCNConv

# 2-2 搭建 GCN 模型
class GCNNet(torch.nn.Module):
    """
    两层 GCN 分类模型
    图卷积网络 (GCN) 通过聚合邻居节点信息来学习节点表示
    """
    def __init__(self, in_channels, hidden_channels, out_channels):
        super(GCNNet, self).__init__()
        # 第一个 GCN 卷积层
        self.conv1 = GCNConv(in_channels, hidden_channels)
        # 第二个 GCN 卷积层
        self.conv2 = GCNConv(hidden_channels, out_channels)
        
    def forward(self, x, edge_index):
        # 第一层: ReLU激活 + GCNConv
        x = self.conv1(x, edge_index)
        x = F.relu(x)
        x = F.dropout(x, p=0.5, training=self.training)
        
        # 第二层: GCNConv (输出层)
        x = self.conv2(x, edge_index)
        
        # 输出层不需要 softmax，因为 CrossEntropyLoss 会自动处理
        return x

# 模型实例化

```python
"""
Step 3: GCN (Graph Convolutional Network) 网络实现
"""
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch_geometric.nn import GCNConv
from torch_geometric.datasets import Planetoid
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# ============ 3.1 两层GCN网络 ============
class GCNNet(torch.nn.Module):
    """
    两层图卷积网络 (GCN)
    
    公式: H^(l+1) = sigma(D^(-1/2) A^~ D^(-1/2) H^(l) W^(l))
    其中: A^~ = A + I (加入自环)
          D^~ 是 A^~ 的度矩阵
    """
    def __init__(self, in_channels, hidden_channels, out_channels, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.dropout = dropout
        
        # 第一层GCN
        self.conv1 = GCNConv(in_channels, hidden_channels)
        # 第二层GCN
        self.conv2 = GCNConv(hidden_channels, out_channels)
    
    def forward(self, x, edge_index):
        """
        前向传播
        x: 节点特征矩阵, shape [num_nodes, in_channels]
        edge_index: 边索引, shape [2, num_edges]
        """
        # 第一层卷积 + ReLU激活 + Dropout
        x = self.conv1(x, edge_index)
        x = F.relu(x)
        x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)
        
        # 第二层卷积
        x = self.conv2(x, edge_index)
        
        return x

# ============ 3.2 加载数据 ============
dataset = Planetoid(root='data/Cora', name='Cora')
data = dataset[0]

print(f"数据集: Cora")
print(f"输入维度: {dataset.num_features}")
print(f"输出维度: {dataset.num_classes}")
print(f"隐藏层维度: 16")

# ============ 3.3 创建模型 ============
model = GCNNet(
    in_channels=dataset.num_features,
    hidden_channels=16,
    out_channels=dataset.num_classes,
    dropout=0.5
)

print(f"\n模型结构:")
print(model)

# 参数量统计
total_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())
trainable_params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad)
print(f"\n参数量:")
print(f"  总参数: {total_params:,}")
print(f"  可训练参数: {trainable_params:,}")

# 每层的参数量
for name, param in model.named_parameters():
    print(f"  {name}: {param.shape} ({param.numel():,} params)")

# ============ 3.4 前向传播测试 ============
print(f"\n前向传播测试:")
print(f"  输入 x shape: {data.x.shape}")
print(f"  输入 edge_index shape: {data.edge_index.shape}")

model.eval()
with torch.no_grad():
    output = model(data.x, data.edge_index)

print(f"  输出 shape: {output.shape}")
print(f"  输出示例 (前3个节点):")
for i in range(3):
    probs = F.softmax(output[i], dim=0)
    pred = output[i].argmax().item()
    print(f"    Node {i}: pred_class={pred}, confidence={probs[pred]:.4f}")

# ============ 3.5 GCN与MLP对比 ============
class MLPNet(torch.nn.Module):
    """纯MLP基线模型（不使用图结构）"""
    def __init__(self, in_channels, hidden_channels, out_channels, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.dropout = dropout
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_channels)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, out_channels)
    
    def forward(self, x, edge_index=None):
        # MLP不使用edge_index
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = F.relu(x)
        x = F.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x

mlp_model = MLPNet(dataset.num_features, 16, dataset.num_classes)
mlp_params = sum(p.numel() for p in mlp_model.parameters())

print(f"\n模型对比:")
print(f"  GCN 参数: {total_params:,}")
print(f"  MLP 参数: {mlp_params:,}")
print(f"  GCN/MLP 参数比: {total_params/mlp_params:.2f}x")
print(f"\n  GCN 利用图结构信息，参数更少但效果更好（半监督学习）")

print("\n✓ GCN网络实现完成！")
```
